---
title: "Ligea Alexander"
title-block-banner: false
image: images/italy.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/ligeaalexander
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ligeaalexander/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:ligea.alex@gmail.com
listing:
  - id: latest-work
    type: grid
    max-items: 6
    grid-columns: 3
    contents:
      - title: "[The Cost of Sunlight](https://ligea-alexander.github.io/cost-of-sunlight-story/#BEGIN)"
        description: "Link to the project or additional details can be placed here."
        image: images/test.png
      - title: "[Cellar Defenders](https://ligea-alexander.github.io/cellar-defenders/)"
        description: "Link to the project or additional details can be placed here."
        image: images/millinneal on the chase.png
      - title: "[Manhattan is the safest place to bike in NYC. What about the rest of New York?](https://biking-safety-io.vercel.app)"
        description: "Link to the project or additional details can be placed here."
        image: images/nyc_spatial_equity.png
---

<!-- Include the Typed.js library -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/typed.js@2.0.12"></script>

<!-- HTML element for displaying the text -->
<div id="typed-text-container" style="width: 100%; text-align: center;">
  <span id="typed-text"></span>
</div>

<!-- Initialize Typed.js -->
<script>
  var typed = new Typed('#typed-text', {
    strings: [
      "She is a multi-disciplinary visual storyteller based in NYC.",
      // "She is a human-centered designer based in NYC.",
      "She is a data-person.",
      "She is a burgeoning interactives designer/IxD.",
      "She is an intermediate level German speaker.",
      "She is Trinidadian born and raised (and quite proud of that).",
      "She is super excited to work with you!"
    ],
    typeSpeed: 50,
    backSpeed: 30,
    loop: true,
    showCursor: true,
    cursorChar: '|',
    autoInsertCss: true
  });
</script>

<!-- CSS to ensure the cursor stays inline with the text -->
<style>
  #typed-text-container {
    display: inline-block;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  
  .typed-cursor {
    display: inline;
    font-size: inherit;
    color: inherit;
    opacity: 1;
    animation: blink 0.7s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes blink {
    0% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0; }
    100% { opacity: 1; }
  }
</style>

<br>
<br>

<!-- <p>Latest Work</p> -->

<!-- Grid of Latest Work -->

<!-- :::{.grid}
:::{.g-col-4}
[![Cost of Sunlight](images/test.png)](https://ligea-alexander.github.io/cost-of-sunlight-story/#BEGIN)
**The Cost of Sunlight**
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
[![Cellar Defenders](images/millinneal on the chase.png)](https://ligea-alexander.github.io/cellar-defenders/)
**Cellar Defenders**
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
[![NYC Spatial Equity](images/nyc_spatial_equity.png)](https://biking-safety-io.vercel.app)
**Manhattan is the safest place to bike in NYC. What about the rest of New York?**
::: -->


:::{#latest-work}
:::
